title: 48″ x 24″ Sanborn Stainless Steel Perforated Basket Centrifuge
shortDescription: Unused Sanborn 48″ x 24″ stainless steel perforated basket centrifuge with sanitary pressure casing, rated to 1150 rpm and driven by a 25 HP hydraulic drive.
description: Unused Sanborn 48″ X 24″ stainless steel pressure casing sanitary construction basket centrifuge. Tested to 30 psi operating pressure 20 psi @ 650°F. National Board stamped. Single action plow – rinse and wash nozzles vibration switch. Maximum rpm of 1150. 95#/cubic foot load rating. 25 HP 3 phase, 60 cycle, 460 volt, Volvo hydraulic drive.

specs.label: Drive
specs.value: 25 HP, 3 phase, 60 cycle, 460 volt, Volvo hydraulic

title: 49″ Krauss-Maffei HZ125 Peeler Centrifuge
shortDescription: Used Krauss-Maffei HZ125 stainless steel horizontal peeler centrifuge with a 1250mm basket, 2.45 m² filtration area, and 1200 rpm maximum basket speed.
description: Used Krauss Maffei model HZ125 stainless steel horizontal peeler centrifuge. Has 1250mm diameter basket with 2.45sqmt filtration area. Maximum basket volume 323dm3, maximum basket speed at 1,200rpm.

title: 600mm Heinkel HF-600.1 Inverting Filter Centrifuge (Hastelloy C22)
shortDescription: 600mm Hastelloy C22 Heinkel HF-600.1 inverting filter centrifuge with 0.45 m² filter area, 1940 rpm max speed and explosion-proof drives; CE and TUV certified.
description: 600mm diameter Hastelloy C22 wetted parts Heinkel HF-600.1 inverting filter centrifuge, fabrik #1246/11, 0.45 square meter filter area, max speed 1940 rpm, load 65kg (52 liter), max G-Force 1250, explosion class E Exde II CT4, non-wetted parts 316L stainless steel (1.4571), Teflon seals, basket driven by 22 kw, 3/50/500 volt, 1500 rpm E Exd II CT4 motor, inverting mechanism driven by 5.5 kw, 3/50/500 volt, 1500 rpm E Exd II CT4 motor, feed pipe with 1.5kw, 3/50/500 volt, 1500 rpm E Exd II CT4 motor, hinged front door, control panels, CE and TUV certified

title: 850mm x 400mm Heine 316SS Perforated Basket Centrifuge
shortDescription: 850mm x 400mm deep 316 stainless steel perforated basket centrifuge by Heine, 1300 rpm basket speed and 150 kg load, driven by a 5.5 kW explosion-proof hydraulic power pack.
description: 850mm diameter x 400mm deep, 316S stainless steel perforated basket centrifuge. Manufactured by Heine, serial #6886. Material of construction V4AE. Basket speed 1300 rpm. 5mm wall thickness. 150 Kg load. 5″ cake thickness. Top load/unload. basket was driven by 5.5 KW, 3/50/380 volt explosion proof hydraulic powerpak. Openings: 1-1″ feed, 1-1 1/2″ vapour, 1-3″ filtrate, top cover: 2-4″ sight glasses, 2-1″.

title: Alfa Laval CHB 209T-15CEFP-50 Separator Centrifuge
shortDescription: Little-used Alfa Laval CHB 209T-15CEFP-50 stainless steel separator with a 15 kW explosion-proof motor and inert gas system.
description: Little used Alfa Laval CHB 209T-15CEFP-50 stainless steel separator. Brook Cromptoon ex. proof motor 15,0 kW/50Hz. Inert gas system. All controls included.

specs.label: Features
specs.value: Inert gas system, all controls included

title: 250mm Krauss-Maffei SZ-21 Pusher Centrifuge
shortDescription: Used Krauss-Maffei SZ-21 316 stainless steel single-stage pusher centrifuge with a 250mm basket, 2400 rpm and a 7.5 HP motor.
description: Used Krauss Maffei model SZ-21 316 stainless steel pusher centrifuge. 250mm diameter single stage cylindrical basket. ADM density kg/cubic meter 1700, ADM load 9 kg. Equipped with 7.5 HP motor, 230-460/3/60. 2400 rpm.

title: 31″ Comi-Condor CF-400 Basket Centrifuge
shortDescription: Used 1993 Comi-Condor CF-400 basket centrifuge with an 800mm (31″) basket, 1500 rpm max speed, 135 kg load and a 15 hp Marathon motor.
description: Used 31″ Comi-Condor Basket Centrifuge Model: CF-400 Type: Alfa/SB/IV800 Year: 1993 Max. Basket Bowl Speed: 1500 RPM Basket Bowl Diameter: 800mm (31″) Max. Load: 135 kg Cake Volume: 99 lt Design Pressure: +0.4 bar Design Temperature: 100°C Driven by a 15 hp Marathon motor

title: 36″ x 20″ AT&M/DeLaval Mark III 316SS Perforated Basket Centrifuge
shortDescription: 36″ x 20″ deep AT&M/DeLaval Mark III batch perforated basket centrifuge, 6 cu ft capacity, 304/316 stainless construction, driven by a 30 HP hydraulic power pack.
description: 36″ x 20″ deep, AT&M/DeLaval Mark III, 316SS batch perforated basket centrifuge. SN 65-644. Basket capacity 6 cu ft. 5″ lip. Top load, btm unload design. 304SS basket, 316SS curb and plow. Top driven by hydraulic powerpak, mfd by Hydreco, 30 HP, 3/60/230/460 volt, 1760 rpm XP motor. Pneumatic plow.

title: 40″ x 20″ Tolhurst 316SS Bottom-Discharge Basket Centrifuge
shortDescription: 40″ x 20″ deep Tolhurst 316 stainless steel bottom-discharge basket centrifuge, 900 rpm max speed, 460 G, 7.4 cu ft cake capacity, underdriven hydraulic motor.
description: 40″ x 20″ deep, Tolhurst 316SS bottom discharge basket centrifuge. SN T-64129. Maximum speed 900 rpm. 460 Gs. 7.4 cubic feet cake capacity. 316SS basket and plow, 316SS lined CS curb. Underdriven hydraulic motor (no powerpak). Hydraulic plow.

title: Sharples Mark III 3PP-350H Perforate Basket Centrifuge (316SS)
shortDescription: Reconditioned Sharples Mark III 3PP-350H 316 stainless steel perforate basket centrifuge, 3250 rpm max bowl speed, 2100 G, skid-mounted with full mechanical warranty.
description: Max bowl speed 3250, 2100 Gs, model 3PP-350H, 14 x 6″ basket ID. 2 HP variable speed hydraulic drive 208/230/3/60/3450 RPM, fumetite design, braking system, feed and wash pipes, vents, belt guard and controls. Unitized on a skid. Reconditioned with full mechanical warranty.
